acceptance_criteria.description: Users can create/join a couple using a join code and both partners see a shared workspace.
verify: manual: create two users, pair them with one join code, confirm shared dashboard visibility

acceptance_criteria.description: Bank integration is enabled through Android Notification Listener permission flow without storing raw banking credentials.
verify: manual: enable notification permission in Android settings flow and confirm integration status
manual: security review confirms no raw banking credentials are collected or stored

acceptance_criteria.description: Notification-captured transaction events are uploaded, validated, deduplicated, persisted, and categorized automatically.
verify: manual: trigger a supported bank push notification and confirm transaction creation with category
manual: send repeated equivalent events and verify deduplication prevents duplicate transaction records

acceptance_criteria.description: Dashboard shows combined net worth, individual balances, and shared expenses.
verify: manual: login as each partner and validate consistent shared aggregates

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can create, edit, archive, and track goals with target amount, current progress, and deadline.
verify: manual: create, update, archive a goal and confirm state transitions

acceptance_criteria.description: Projected cash flow is available for at least 30-day and 90-day horizons.
verify: manual: compare generated projections for 30 and 90 day windows using seeded data

acceptance_criteria.description: Push alerts are sent for low balance, large transaction, and upcoming bill events.
verify: manual: simulate each alert condition and confirm FCM delivery

acceptance_criteria.description: Authorization enforces couple-level data isolation across all read/write endpoints.
verify: manual: attempt cross-couple data access and confirm denial
manual: API authorization review for couple-scoped queries

acceptance_criteria.description: System handles notification capture/parsing/upload failures with retry and user-visible integration status.
verify: manual: simulate parser/upload failure and confirm retry behavior plus UI status messaging

acceptance_criteria.description: Mobile UX supports core actions in up to three taps and dashboard load target under 2.5 seconds under normal conditions.
verify: manual: execute tap-count walkthrough for connect account, create goal, and open projection
manual: performance check on mid-tier Android test device

acceptance_criteria.description: AI workflow artifacts exist and remain current for each session (spec, acceptance, tasks, status, report).
verify: manual: check .agents-work/<session>/ files are present and logically consistent

acceptance_criteria.description: Pilot deployment approach for backend, database, and Android distribution is documented and executable.
verify: manual: review deployment runbook for PaaS backend and APK/internal testing distribution
